idea-plugin.name: ComplexArgs
idea-plugin.description:
Manage Unreal Engine commandline argument presets for Rider C++ run configurations.

A main-toolbar widget rolls out an editor where you organise arguments into groups, toggle them with checkboxes, and reorder them by drag-and-drop. Enabled entries are concatenated in the order you tick them and appended to the selected run configuration's program parameters at launch - your existing arguments are preserved, not overwritten.

  • Groups with drag-and-drop reordering within and across groups.
  • Per-project enable/order state, kept separate from the shared preset definitions.
  • Working-directory override to share preset definitions across branches or checkouts.
